articles.author: Aditi Bharade
articles.title: CEOs of America's biggest airlines say $0 TSA paychecks during the government shutdown are 'simply unacceptable' - Business Insider
articles.description: The CEOs of United Airlines, Delta Air Lines, and other companies called for Congress to pass acts protecting TSA workers during shutdowns.
articles.content:
America's top airline executives blasted Congress over the government shutdown's impact on aviation workers.
In an open letter on Sunday, the executives called air travel a "political football amid … [+1855 chars]

articles.title: Iranian foreign minister says "we don't see any reason why we should talk with Americans" - CBS News
articles.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi said that "we don't see any reason why we should talk with Americans" as President Trump has claimed Iran is seeking a deal to end the war between the U.S. and Iran.
